name: Connector
description: Connector schema from Palo Alto Networks ZTNA Connector API

group_id.description: ID of the connector group this connector belongs to.

status.description: Current health status of the connector.

hostname.description: Hostname of the system where the connector is installed.

ip_address.description: IP address of the connector host.

region.description: Geographic region where the connector is deployed.

last_seen_at.description: Timestamp of the connector's most recent heartbeat.
